doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 concerns multijurisdictional practice by lawyers and does not contain the subsections shown here regarding paralegal activities, direct supervision requirements, or "no recognized emergency exception" language
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers and does not contain subsections defining paralegal activities, "direct supervision" requirements, or statements about "no recognized emergency exception" — these sections appear to be invented content presented in an official-looking format.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
